plugins.name: headroom-usage-indicator
plugins.description: Status-line indicator showing whether the headroom MCP context-compression is being used this session — idle until headroom_compress runs, then active with the tokens AND money it saved (priced against the session model), decaying back to idle after a quiet period. Tracks an all-time money-saved total across sessions. Idle badges also nudge with a count of large tool results that went uncompressed. Includes Dangi, a real-time PostToolUse detector that nudges Claude (and optionally you) the moment a big uncompressed output lands.
